ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region of the energy data */,
  "settlement_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the settlement */,
  "total_demand" REAL /* Total energy demand at the time of settlement */,
  "rrp" REAL /* Regional Reference Price at the time of settlement */,
  "period_type" TEXT /* Type of the period for which the data is recorded */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source from which the data was ingested */,
  "forecast_model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the forecasting model used for the data */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* A score indicating the quality of the data entry */,
  "data_quality_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes regarding the data quality */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_period_type FOREIGN KEY ("period_type") REFERENCES period_types ("period_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_forecast_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_model_id") REFERENCES forecast_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region's characteristics */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "period_types" (
  "period_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each period type */,
  "period_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the period type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the period type */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the period type in minutes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the period type entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the period type entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES energy_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source used for the report */,
  "forecast_model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecasting model used for the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_reports_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_reports_forecast_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_model_id") REFERENCES forecast_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., API, database) */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source (if applicable) */,
  "last_synced_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was last synchronized */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecasting model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of forecasting model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the forecasting model */,
  "accuracy_score" REAL /* Accuracy score of the forecasting model */,
  "last_trained_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last trained */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the forecast model entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the forecast model entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who receives the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was issued */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the notification has been read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality check */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date of the quality check */,
  "check_result" TEXT /* Outcome of the quality check */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the quality check */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the quality check */,
  "check_type" TEXT /* Type of quality check performed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the quality check was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checks_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES energy_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
